text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well... They don't suit me, do they?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I feel embarrassed now. I mean, they don't suit me
at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Cute plushies and such aren't really my style...
Maybe I'll get a bag.
choice_data_list: I think you look great together!
I think you look great together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I look so out of place holding cute plushies and
what have you. Do you think I should get a bag?
choice_data_list: I think you look great together!
I think you look great together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sure, just say whatever to make me feel better...
Well, I guess it would be a waste of a bag anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Y-you think so? Then I'll hug this one the whole
way home... ♪
